parameters.name: config_node_consensus_protocol_class
parameters.description: Consensus protocol of ConfigNode replicas, only support RatisConsensus
parameters.effective: Only allowed to be modified in first start up

parameters.name: schema_replication_factor
parameters.description: Schema replication num
parameters.effective: Take effect on **new created Databases** after restarting system

parameters.name: schema_region_consensus_protocol_class
parameters.description: Consensus protocol of schema replicas，larger than 1 replicas could only use RatisConsensus
parameters.effective: Only allowed to be modified in first start up

parameters.name: data_replication_factor
parameters.description: Data replication num
parameters.effective: Take effect on **new created Databases** after restarting system

parameters.name: data_region_consensus_protocol_class
parameters.description: Consensus protocol of data replicas，larger than 1 replicas could use IoTConsensus or RatisConsensus
parameters.effective: Only allowed to be modified in first start up

parameters.name: series_slot_num
parameters.description: Slot num of series partition
parameters.effective: Only allowed to be modified in first start up

parameters.name: series_partition_executor_class
parameters.description: Series partition hash function
parameters.effective: Only allowed to be modified in first start up

parameters.name: schema_region_group_extension_policy
parameters.description: The extension policy of SchemaRegionGroup

parameters.name: default_schema_region_group_num_per_database
parameters.description: The number of SchemaRegionGroups that each Database has when using the CUSTOM-SchemaRegionGroup extension policy. The least number of SchemaRegionGroups that each Database has when using the AUTO-SchemaRegionGroup extension policy.

parameters.name: schema_region_per_data_node
parameters.description: The maximum number of SchemaRegion expected to be managed by each DataNode

parameters.name: data_region_group_extension_policy
parameters.description: The extension policy of DataRegionGroup

parameters.name: default_data_region_group_num_per_database
parameters.description: The number of DataRegionGroups that each Database has when using the CUSTOM-DataRegionGroup extension policy. The least number of DataRegionGroups that each Database has when using the AUTO-DataRegionGroup extension policy.

parameters.name: data_region_per_data_node
parameters.description: The maximum number of DataRegion expected to be managed by each DataNode

parameters.name: enable_data_partition_inherit_policy
parameters.description: Whether to enable the DataPartition inherit policy

parameters.name: leader_distribution_policy
parameters.description: The policy of cluster RegionGroups' leader distribution

parameters.name: enable_auto_leader_balance_for_ratis_consensus
parameters.description: Whether to enable auto leader balance for Ratis consensus protocol

parameters.name: enable_auto_leader_balance_for_iot_consensus
parameters.description: Whether to enable auto leader balance for IoTConsensus protocol

parameters.name: cluster_name
parameters.description: The name of cluster
parameters.effective: Execute SQL in CLI: ```set configuration 'cluster_name'='xxx'``` (xxx is the new cluster name)

parameters.name: disk_space_warning_threshold
parameters.description: Disk remaining threshold

parameters.name: datanode_memory_proportion
parameters.description: Memory Allocation Ratio: StorageEngine, QueryEngine, SchemaEngine, Consensus, StreamingEngine,  and Free Memory

parameters.name: schema_memory_proportion
parameters.description: Schema Memory Allocation Ratio: SchemaRegion, SchemaCache, and PartitionCache.

parameters.name: storage_engine_memory_proportion
parameters.description: Memory allocation ratio in StorageEngine: Write, Compaction

parameters.name: write_memory_proportion
parameters.description: Memory allocation ratio in writing: Memtable, TimePartitionInfo

parameters.name: concurrent_writing_time_partition
parameters.description:
This config decides how many time partitions in a database can be inserted concurrently
For example, your partitionInterval is 86400 and you want to insert data in 5 different days,

parameters.name: primitive_array_size
parameters.description: primitive array size (length of each array) in array pool

parameters.name: chunk_metadata_size_proportion
parameters.description: size proportion for chunk metadata maintains in memory when writing tsfile

parameters.name: flush_proportion
parameters.description: Ratio of write memory for invoking flush disk, 0.4 by default If you have extremely high write load (like batch=1000), it can be set lower than the default value like 0.2

parameters.name: buffered_arrays_memory_proportion
parameters.description: Ratio of write memory allocated for buffered arrays

parameters.name: reject_proportion
parameters.description: Ratio of write memory for rejecting insertion

parameters.name: write_memory_variation_report_proportion
parameters.description: if memory cost of data region increased more than proportion of allocated memory for write, report to system

parameters.name: check_period_when_insert_blocked
parameters.description: when an inserting is rejected, waiting period (in ms) to check system again

parameters.name: io_task_queue_size_for_flushing
parameters.description: size of ioTaskQueue. The default value is 10

parameters.name: enable_query_memory_estimation
parameters.description: If true, we will estimate each query's possible memory footprint before executing it and deny it if its estimated memory exceeds current free memory

parameters.name: partition_cache_size
parameters.description: The max num of partition info record cached on DataNode.

parameters.name: schema_engine_mode
parameters.description: Schema engine mode, supporting Memory and PBTree modes; PBTree mode support evict the timeseries schema temporarily not used in memory at runtime, and load it into memory from disk when needed. This parameter must be the same on all DataNodes in one cluster.
parameters.effective: Only allowed to be modified in first start up

parameters.name: mlog_buffer_size
parameters.description: size of log buffer in each metadata operation plan(in byte)

parameters.name: sync_mlog_period_in_ms
parameters.description: The cycle when metadata log is periodically forced to be written to disk(in milliseconds). If force_mlog_period_in_ms = 0 it means force metadata log to be written to disk after each refreshment

parameters.name: tag_attribute_flush_interval
parameters.description: interval num for tag and attribute records when force flushing to disk. When a certain amount of tag and attribute records is reached, they will be force flushed to disk. It is possible to lose at most tag_attribute_flush_interval records
parameters.effective: Only allowed to be modified in first start up

parameters.name: tag_attribute_total_size
parameters.description: The maximum persistence size of tags and attributes of each time series.
parameters.effective: Only allowed to be modified in first start up

parameters.name: schema_region_device_node_cache_size
parameters.description: The max num of device node, used for speeding up device query, cached in schemaRegion.

parameters.name: max_measurement_num_of_internal_request
parameters.description: When there's too many measurements in one create timeseries plan, the plan will be split to several sub plan, with measurement num no more than this param.

parameters.name: enable_auto_create_schema
parameters.description: whether auto create the time series when a non-existed time series data comes

parameters.name: default_storage_group_level
parameters.description: Database level when creating schema automatically is enabled. For example, if we receives a data point from root.sg0.d1.s2, we will set root.sg0 as the database if database level is 1. (root is level 0)

parameters.name: boolean_string_infer_type
parameters.description: To which type the values "true" and "false" should be reslved

parameters.name: integer_string_infer_type
parameters.description: To which type an integer string like "67" in a query should be resolved
parameters.type: INT32, INT64, DOUBLE, FLOAT or TEXT

parameters.name: floating_string_infer_type
parameters.description: To which type a floating number string like "6.7" in a query should be resolved

parameters.name: nan_string_infer_type
parameters.description: To which type the value NaN in a query should be resolved

parameters.name: default_boolean_encoding
parameters.description: BOOLEAN encoding when creating schema automatically is enabled

parameters.name: default_float_encoding
parameters.description: FLOAT encoding when creating schema automatically is enabled

parameters.name: default_double_encoding
parameters.description: DOUBLE encoding when creating schema automatically is enabled

parameters.name: default_text_encoding
parameters.description: TEXT encoding when creating schema automatically is enabled

parameters.name: boolean_compressor
parameters.description: BOOLEAN compression when creating schema automatically is enabled (Supports from V2.0.6)

parameters.name: float_compressor
parameters.description: FLOAT compression when creating schema automatically is enabled (Supports from V2.0.6)

parameters.name: double_compressor
parameters.description: DOUBLE compression when creating schema automatically is enabled (Supports from V2.0.6)

parameters.name: text_compressor
parameters.description: TEXT/BINARY/BLOB compression when creating schema automatically is enabled (Supports from V2.0.6)

parameters.name: mpp_data_exchange_core_pool_size
parameters.description:
The read consistency level,
1. strong(Default, read from the leader replica)
2. weak(Read from a random replica)

parameters.name: meta_data_cache_enable
parameters.description: Whether to cache meta data(BloomFilter, ChunkMetadata and TimeSeriesMetadata) or not.

parameters.name: enable_last_cache
parameters.description: Whether to enable LAST cache.

parameters.name: max_deduplicated_path_num
parameters.description: allowed max numbers of deduplicated path in one query.

parameters.name: mpp_data_exchange_core_pool_size
parameters.description: Core size of ThreadPool of MPP data exchange

parameters.name: mpp_data_exchange_max_pool_size
parameters.description: Max size of ThreadPool of MPP data exchange

parameters.name: mpp_data_exchange_keep_alive_time_in_ms
parameters.description: Max waiting time for MPP data exchange

parameters.name: driver_task_execution_time_slice_in_ms
parameters.description: Maximum execution time of a DriverTask

parameters.name: max_tsblock_size_in_bytes
parameters.description: Maximum capacity of a TsBlock

parameters.name: max_tsblock_line_numbers
parameters.description: Maximum number of lines in a single TsBlock

parameters.name: slow_query_threshold
parameters.description: Time cost(ms) threshold for slow query.

parameters.name: query_timeout_threshold
parameters.description: The max executing time of query. unit: ms

parameters.name: max_allowed_concurrent_queries
parameters.description: The maximum allowed concurrently executing queries.

parameters.name: query_thread_count
parameters.description: How many threads can concurrently execute query statement. When <= 0, use CPU core number.

parameters.name: batch_size
parameters.description: The amount of data iterate each time in server (the number of data strips, that is, the number of different timestamps.)

parameters.name: sort_buffer_size_in_bytes
parameters.description: The memory for external sort in sort operator, when the data size is smaller than sort_buffer_size_in_bytes, the sort operator will use in-memory sort.
parameters.default:
1048576(Before V2.0.6)
0(Supports from V2.0.6), if `sort_buffer_size_in_bytes <= 0`, default value will be used, `default value = min(32MB, memory for query operators / query_thread_count / 2)`, if `sort_buffer_size_in_bytes > 0`, the specified value will be used.

parameters.name: ttl_check_interval
parameters.description: The interval of TTL check task in each database. Unit: ms. Default is 2 hours.

parameters.name: max_expired_time
parameters.description: If a file contains device that has expired for more than this duration, then the file will be settled immediately. Unit: ms.  Default is 1 month.

parameters.name: expired_data_ratio
parameters.description: The expired device ratio. If the ratio of expired devices in one file exceeds this value, then expired data of this file will be cleaned by compaction.

parameters.name: timestamp_precision
parameters.description: timestamp precision，support ms、us、ns
parameters.effective: Only allowed to be modified in first start up

parameters.name: tier_ttl_in_ms
parameters.description: Define the maximum age of data for which each tier is responsible

parameters.name: max_waiting_time_when_insert_blocked
parameters.description: When the waiting time(in ms) of an inserting exceeds this, throw an exception

parameters.name: handle_system_error
parameters.description: What will the system do when unrecoverable error occurs

parameters.name: write_memory_variation_report_proportion
parameters.description: if memory cost of data region increased more than proportion of allocated memory for write, report to system

parameters.name: enable_timed_flush_seq_memtable
parameters.description: whether to enable timed flush sequence memtable

parameters.name: seq_memtable_flush_interval_in_ms
parameters.description: if a memTable's created time is older than current time minus this, the memtable will be flushed to disk

parameters.name: seq_memtable_flush_check_interval_in_ms
parameters.description: the interval to check whether sequence memtables need flushing

parameters.name: enable_timed_flush_unseq_memtable
parameters.description: whether to enable timed flush unsequence memtable

parameters.name: unseq_memtable_flush_interval_in_ms
parameters.description: if a memTable's created time is older than current time minus this, the memtable will be flushed to disk

parameters.name: unseq_memtable_flush_check_interval_in_ms
parameters.description: the interval to check whether unsequence memtables need flushing

parameters.name: tvlist_sort_algorithm
parameters.description: the sort algorithm used in the memtable's TVList

parameters.name: avg_series_point_number_threshold
parameters.description: max average number of point of each series in memtable

parameters.name: flush_thread_count
parameters.description: The thread number used to perform the operation when IoTDB writes data in memory to disk. If the value is less than or equal to 0, then the number of CPU cores installed on the machine is used. The default is 0.

parameters.name: enable_partial_insert
parameters.description: Whether continue to write other measurements if some measurements are failed in one insertion.

parameters.name: recovery_log_interval_in_ms
parameters.description: the interval to log recover progress of each region when starting iotdb

parameters.name: device_path_cache_size
parameters.description: The max size of the device path cache. This cache is for avoiding initialize duplicated device id object in write process

parameters.name: insert_multi_tablet_enable_multithreading_column_threshold
parameters.description: When the insert plan column count reaches the specified threshold, multi-threading is enabled.

parameters.name: enable_seq_space_compaction
parameters.description: enable the compaction between sequence files

parameters.name: enable_unseq_space_compaction
parameters.description: enable the compaction between unsequence files

parameters.name: enable_cross_space_compaction
parameters.description: enable the compaction between sequence files and unsequence files

parameters.name: enable_auto_repair_compaction
parameters.description: enable auto repair unsorted file by compaction

parameters.name: cross_selector
parameters.description: the selector of cross space compaction task

parameters.name: cross_performer
parameters.description: the compaction performer of cross space compaction task, Options: read_point, fast

parameters.name: inner_seq_selector
parameters.description: the task selector of inner sequence space compaction task. Options: size\_tiered\_single_\target,size\_tiered\_multi\_target

parameters.name: inner_seq_peformer
parameters.description: the task performer of inner sequence space compaction task. The options are read_chunk and fast

parameters.name: inner_unseq_selector
parameters.description: the task selector of inner unsequence space compactionn task. Options: size\_tiered\_single_\target,size\_tiered\_multi\_target

parameters.name: inner_unseq_peformer
parameters.description: the task performer of inner unsequence space compaction task. The options are read_point and fast

parameters.name: compaction_priority
parameters.description: Priority of compaction task. When it is BALANCE, system executes all types of compaction equally; when it is INNER\_CROSS, system takes precedence over executing inner space compaction task; when it is CROSS\_INNER, system takes precedence over executing cross space compaction task

parameters.name: target_compaction_file_size
parameters.description: This parameter is used in two places: 1. The target tsfile size of inner space compaction. 2. The candidate size of seq tsfile in cross space compaction will be smaller than target_compaction_file_size * 1.5. In most cases, the target file size of cross compaction won't exceed this threshold, and if it does, it will not be much larger than it.

parameters.name: target_chunk_size
parameters.description: The target chunk size in flushing and compaction.If the size of a timeseries in memtable exceeds this, the data will be flushed to multiple chunks.

parameters.name: target_chunk_point_num
parameters.description: The target point nums in one chunk in flushing and compaction.  If the point number of a timeseries in memtable exceeds this, the data will be flushed to multiple chunks.

parameters.name: chunk_size_lower_bound_in_compaction
parameters.description: If the chunk size is lower than this threshold, it will be deserialized into points, default is 128 byte

parameters.name: chunk_point_num_lower_bound_in_compaction
parameters.description: If the chunk point num is lower than this threshold, it will be deserialized into points

parameters.name: inner_compaction_total_file_num_threshold
parameters.description: The total file num limit in inner space compaction.

parameters.name: inner_compaction_total_file_size_threshold
parameters.description: The total file size limit in inner space compaction. Unit: byte

parameters.name: compaction_max_aligned_series_num_in_one_batch
parameters.description: How many value chunk will be compacted in aligned series compaction

parameters.name: max_level_gap_in_inner_compaction
parameters.description: The max level gap in inner compaction selection

parameters.name: inner_compaction_candidate_file_num
parameters.description: The file num requirement when selecting inner space compaction candidate files

parameters.name: max_cross_compaction_candidate_file_num
parameters.description: The max file when selecting cross space compaction candidate files. At least one unseq file with it's overlapped seq files will be selected even exceeded this number

parameters.name: max_cross_compaction_candidate_file_size
parameters.description: The max total size when selecting cross space compaction candidate files. At least one unseq file with it's overlapped seq files will be selected even exceeded this number

parameters.name: compaction_thread_count
parameters.description: thread num to execute compaction

parameters.name: compaction_schedule_interval_in_ms
parameters.description: interval of scheduling compaction

parameters.name: compaction_write_throughput_mb_per_sec
parameters.description: The limit of write throughput merge can reach per second,values less than or equal to 0 means no limit

parameters.name: compaction_read_throughput_mb_per_sec
parameters.description: The limit of read throughput merge can reach per second, values less than or equal to 0 means no limit

parameters.name: compaction_read_operation_per_sec
parameters.description: The limit of read operation merge can reach per second, values less than or equal to 0 means no limit

parameters.name: sub_compaction_thread_count
parameters.description: The number of sub compaction threads to be set up to perform compaction. Currently only works for nonAligned data in cross space compaction and unseq inner space compaction.

parameters.name: enable_tsfile_validation
parameters.description: Verify that TSfiles generated by Flush, Load, and Compaction are correct.

parameters.name: candidate_compaction_task_queue_size
parameters.description: The size of candidate compaction task queue

parameters.name: compaction_schedule_thread_num
parameters.description: The number of threads to be set up to select compaction task.

parameters.name: wal_mode
parameters.description: The write mode of wal. For DISABLE mode, the system will disable wal. For SYNC mode, the system will submit wal synchronously, write request will not return until its wal is fsynced to the disk successfully. For ASYNC mode, the system will submit wal asynchronously, write request will return immediately no matter its wal is fsynced to the disk successfully.

parameters.name: max_wal_nodes_num
parameters.description: Max number of wal nodes, each node corresponds to one wal directory. The default value 0 means the number is determined by the system.

parameters.name: wal_async_mode_fsync_delay_in_ms
parameters.description: Duration a wal flush operation will wait before calling fsync in the async mode

parameters.name: wal_sync_mode_fsync_delay_in_ms
parameters.description: Duration a wal flush operation will wait before calling fsync in the sync mode

parameters.name: wal_buffer_size_in_byte
parameters.description: Buffer size of each wal node

parameters.name: wal_buffer_queue_capacity
parameters.description: Blocking queue capacity of each wal buffer

parameters.name: wal_file_size_threshold_in_byte
parameters.description: Size threshold of each wal file

parameters.name: wal_min_effective_info_ratio
parameters.description: Minimum ratio of effective information in wal files

parameters.name: wal_memtable_snapshot_threshold_in_byte
parameters.description: MemTable size threshold for triggering MemTable snapshot in wal

parameters.name: max_wal_memtable_snapshot_num
parameters.description: MemTable's max snapshot number in wal

parameters.name: delete_wal_files_period_in_ms
parameters.description: The period when outdated wal files are periodically deleted

parameters.name: group_size_in_byte
parameters.description: The data size written to the disk per time

parameters.name: page_size_in_byte
parameters.description: The maximum size of a single page written in memory when each column in memory is written (in bytes)

parameters.name: max_number_of_points_in_page
parameters.description: The maximum number of data points (timestamps - valued groups) contained in a page

parameters.name: pattern_matching_threshold
parameters.description: Max matching time of regex pattern

parameters.name: max_degree_of_index_node
parameters.description: The maximum degree of the metadata index tree (that is, the max number of each node's children)
parameters.effective: Only allowed to be modified in first start up

parameters.name: max_string_length
parameters.description: The maximum length of a single string (number of character)

parameters.name: value_encoder
parameters.description: Encoding type of value column

parameters.name: float_precision
parameters.description: The precision of the floating point number.(The number of digits after the decimal point)
parameters.default: The default is 2 digits. Note: The 32-bit floating point number has a decimal precision of 7 bits, and the 64-bit floating point number has a decimal precision of 15 bits. If the setting is out of the range, it will have no practical significance.

parameters.name: compressor
parameters.description: Data compression method; Time compression method in aligned timeseries

parameters.name: bloomFilterErrorRate
parameters.description: The false positive rate of bloom filter in each TsFile. Bloom filter checks whether a given time series is in the tsfile before loading metadata. This can improve the performance of loading metadata and skip the tsfile that doesn't contain specified time series. If you want to learn more about its mechanism, you can refer to: [wiki page of bloom filter](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bloom_filter).

parameters.name: authorizer_provider_class
parameters.description: the class name of the authorization service

parameters.name: iotdb_server_encrypt_decrypt_provider
parameters.description: The Class for user password encryption
parameters.effective: Only allowed to be modified in first start up

parameters.name: iotdb_server_encrypt_decrypt_provider_parameter
parameters.description: Parameters used to initialize the user password encryption class

parameters.name: author_cache_size
parameters.description: Cache size of user and role

parameters.name: author_cache_expire_time
parameters.description: Cache expire time of user and role, Unit: minutes

parameters.name: udf_initial_byte_array_length_for_memory_control
parameters.description: Used to estimate the memory usage of text fields in a UDF query. It is recommended to set this value to be slightly larger than the average length of all texts.

parameters.name: udf_memory_budget_in_mb
parameters.description: How much memory may be used in ONE UDF query (in MB). The upper limit is 20% of allocated memory for read.

parameters.name: udf_reader_transformer_collector_memory_proportion
parameters.description: UDF memory allocation ratio for reader, transformer and collector. The parameter form is a : b : c, where a, b, and c are integers.

parameters.name: udf_root_dir
parameters.description: Root directory of UDF

parameters.name: udf_lib_dir
parameters.description: UDF log and jar file dir

parameters.name: trigger_lib_dir
parameters.description: Trigger JAR file dir

parameters.name: stateful_trigger_retry_num_when_not_found
parameters.description: How many times we will retry to found an instance of stateful trigger on DataNodes

parameters.name: into_operation_buffer_size_in_byte
parameters.description: When the select-into statement is executed, the maximum memory occupied by the data to be written (unit: Byte)

parameters.name: select_into_insert_tablet_plan_row_limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of rows that can be processed in insert-tablet-plan when executing select-into statements. When <= 0, use 10000.

parameters.name: into_operation_execution_thread_count
parameters.description: The number of threads in the thread pool that execute insert-tablet tasks

parameters.name: continuous_query_execution_thread
parameters.description: How many threads will be set up to perform continuous queries

parameters.name: continuous_query_min_every_interval
parameters.description: Minimum every interval to perform continuous query.

parameters.name: data_region_iot_max_log_entries_num_per_batch
parameters.description: The maximum log entries num in IoTConsensus Batch

parameters.name: data_region_iot_max_size_per_batch
parameters.description: The maximum size in IoTConsensus Batch

parameters.name: data_region_iot_max_pending_batches_num
parameters.description: The maximum pending batches num in IoTConsensus

parameters.name: data_region_iot_max_memory_ratio_for_queue
parameters.description: The maximum memory ratio for queue in IoTConsensus

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_log_appender_buffer_size_max
parameters.description: confignode max payload size for a single log-sync-RPC from leader to follower

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_log_appender_buffer_size_max
parameters.description: schema region max payload size for a single log-sync-RPC from leader to follower

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_log_appender_buffer_size_max
parameters.description: data region max payload size for a single log-sync-RPC from leader to follower

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_snapshot_trigger_threshold
parameters.description: confignode trigger a snapshot when snapshot_trigger_threshold logs are written

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_snapshot_trigger_threshold
parameters.description: schema region trigger a snapshot when snapshot_trigger_threshold logs are written

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_snapshot_trigger_threshold
parameters.description: data region trigger a snapshot when snapshot_trigger_threshold logs are written

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_log_unsafe_flush_enable
parameters.description: confignode allows flushing Raft Log asynchronously

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_log_unsafe_flush_enable
parameters.description: schema region allows flushing Raft Log asynchronously

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_log_unsafe_flush_enable
parameters.description: data region allows flushing Raft Log asynchronously

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_log_segment_size_max_in_byte
parameters.description: confignode max capacity of a single Log segment file

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_log_segment_size_max_in_byte
parameters.description: schema region max capacity of a single Log segment file

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_log_segment_size_max_in_byte
parameters.description: data region max capacity of a single Log segment file

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_grpc_flow_control_window
parameters.description: confignode flow control window for ratis grpc log appender

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_grpc_flow_control_window
parameters.description: schema region flow control window for ratis grpc log appender

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_grpc_flow_control_window
parameters.description: data region flow control window for ratis grpc log appender

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_grpc_leader_outstanding_appends_max
parameters.description: config node grpc pipeline concurrency threshold

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_grpc_leader_outstanding_appends_max
parameters.description: schema region grpc pipeline concurrency threshold

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_grpc_leader_outstanding_appends_max
parameters.description: data region grpc pipeline concurrency threshold

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_log_force_sync_num
parameters.description: config node fsync threshold

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_log_force_sync_num
parameters.description: schema region fsync threshold

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_log_force_sync_num
parameters.description: data region fsync threshold

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_rpc_leader_election_timeout_min_ms
parameters.description: confignode min election timeout for leader election

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_rpc_leader_election_timeout_min_ms
parameters.description: schema region min election timeout for leader election

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_rpc_leader_election_timeout_min_ms
parameters.description: data region min election timeout for leader election

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_rpc_leader_election_timeout_max_ms
parameters.description: confignode max election timeout for leader election

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_rpc_leader_election_timeout_max_ms
parameters.description: schema region max election timeout for leader election

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_rpc_leader_election_timeout_max_ms
parameters.description: data region max election timeout for leader election

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_request_timeout_ms
parameters.description: confignode ratis client retry threshold

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_request_timeout_ms
parameters.description: schema region ratis client retry threshold

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_request_timeout_ms
parameters.description: data region ratis client retry threshold

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_max_retry_attempts
parameters.description: confignode ratis client max retry attempts

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_initial_sleep_time_ms
parameters.description: confignode ratis client retry initial sleep time

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_max_sleep_time_ms
parameters.description: confignode ratis client retry max sleep time

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_max_retry_attempts
parameters.description: schema region ratis client max retry attempts

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_initial_sleep_time_ms
parameters.description: schema region ratis client retry initial sleep time

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_max_sleep_time_ms
parameters.description: schema region ratis client retry max sleep time

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_max_retry_attempts
parameters.description: data region ratis client max retry attempts

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_initial_sleep_time_ms
parameters.description: data region ratis client retry initial sleep time

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_max_sleep_time_ms
parameters.description: data region ratis client retry max sleep time

parameters.name: ratis_first_election_timeout_min_ms
parameters.description: minimal first election timeout for RatisConsensus

parameters.name: ratis_first_election_timeout_max_ms
parameters.description: maximal first election timeout for RatisConsensus

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_preserve_logs_num_when_purge
parameters.description: confignode preserves certain logs when take snapshot and purge

parameters.name: schema_region_ratis_preserve_logs_num_when_purge
parameters.description: schema region preserves certain logs when take snapshot and purge

parameters.name: data_region_ratis_preserve_logs_num_when_purge
parameters.description: data region preserves certain logs when take snapshot and purge

parameters.name: config_node_ratis_periodic_snapshot_interval
parameters.description: duration interval of config-node periodic snapshot

parameters.name: procedure_core_worker_thread_count
parameters.description: The number of worker thread count

parameters.name: enable_mqtt_service。
parameters.description: Whether to enable the MQTT service

parameters.name: mqtt_host
parameters.description: The host to which the MQTT service is bound

parameters.name: mqtt_port
parameters.description: The port to which the MQTT service is bound

parameters.name: mqtt_handler_pool_size
parameters.description: The size of the handler pool used to process MQTT messages

parameters.name: mqtt_payload_formatter
parameters.description: MQTT message payload formatter

parameters.name: mqtt_max_message_size
parameters.description: Maximum length of MQTT message in bytes

parameters.name: load_active_listening_enable
parameters.description: Whether to enable the DataNode's active listening and loading of tsfile functionality (default is enabled).

parameters.name: load_active_listening_dirs
parameters.description: The directories to be listened to (automatically includes subdirectories of the directory), if there are multiple, separate with “,”. The default directory is ext/load/pending (supports hot loading).

parameters.name: load_active_listening_fail_dir
parameters.description: The directory to which files are transferred after the execution of loading tsfile files fails, only one directory can be configured.

parameters.name: load_active_listening_max_thread_num
parameters.description: The maximum number of threads to perform loading tsfile tasks simultaneously. The default value when the parameter is commented out is max(1, CPU core count / 2). When the user sets a value not in the range [1, CPU core count / 2], it will be set to the default value (1, CPU core count / 2).

parameters.name: load_active_listening_check_interval_seconds
parameters.description: Active listening polling interval in seconds. The function of actively listening to tsfile is achieved by polling the folder. This configuration specifies the time interval between two checks of load_active_listening_dirs, and the next check will be executed after load_active_listening_check_interval_seconds seconds of each check. When the user sets the polling interval to less than 1, it will be set to the default value of 5 seconds.

parameters.name: last_cache_operation_on_load
parameters.description: The operation performed to LastCache when a TsFile is successfully loaded. `UPDATE`: use the data in the TsFile to update LastCache; `UPDATE_NO_BLOB`: similar to UPDATE, but will invalidate LastCache for blob series; `CLEAN_DEVICE`: invalidate LastCache of devices contained in the TsFile; `CLEAN_ALL`: clean the whole LastCache.

parameters.name: cache_last_values_for_load
parameters.description: Whether to cache last values before loading a TsFile. Only effective when `last_cache_operation_on_load=UPDATE_NO_BLOB` or `last_cache_operation_on_load=UPDATE`. When set to true, blob series will be ignored even with `last_cache_operation_on_load=UPDATE`. Enabling this will increase the memory footprint during loading TsFiles.

parameters.name: cache_last_values_memory_budget_in_byte
parameters.description: When `cache_last_values_for_load=true`, the maximum memory that can be used to cache last values. If this value is exceeded, the cached values will be abandoned and last values will be read from the TsFile in a streaming manner.
